name: PB4 - TheHive Case Creation
description: Playbook 4: Creates a full investigation case in TheHive via SOAR proxy /case endpoint. Includes severity classification, tags, tasks, and structured evidence. Triggered for high-priority incidents.

triggers.name: T-Pot Alert Webhook
triggers.description: Receives alerts from T-Pot Logstash HTTP output

actions.name: Extract Alert Fields
actions.description: Extract relevant fields from webhook payload

actions.name: Create TheHive Case
actions.description: POST to SOAR proxy /case endpoint. Proxy creates full investigation case in TheHive with tasks and observables.

body.title: Incident: $exec.type from $action-1.src_ip
body.description:
High-severity incident detected by T-Pot honeypot.

Source IP: $action-1.src_ip
Alert type: $action-1.alert_type
Timestamp: $action-1.timestamp

Actions taken:
- IP block triggered (PB1)
- AbuseIPDB enrichment completed (PB2)
- TheHive alert created (PB3)

notes.bottleneck: Docker container spawn + TheHive API call
notes.thehive_result: Full case created in TheHive UI under Cases tab with tasks
notes.tasks_created: Investigate source IP, Verify FortiGate block, Check for lateral movement
notes.setup: TheHive API key is configured in SOAR proxy. Best used together with PB1, PB2, PB3 for complete automated response chain.
